title: 100pc 5mm Screw Wall Plugs | 25mm Masonry Fixings for Brick, Blockwork & Concrete | Ideal for Shelves, Hooks, Small Brackets & General DIY (100pc - 5mm Plugs)
features: Includes 100 durable 5mm plastic wall plugs, each measuring 25mm in length. A reliable fixings solution for everyday DIY, home repairs and trade use
Ideal for use in brick, blockwork, stone and concrete. Provides a secure anchor that helps prevent screws from loosening over time
Designed to expand evenly when the screw is inserted, delivering a stable, long-lasting hold for light to medium-duty installations
Great for fitting small brackets, picture frames, hooks, bathroom accessories, cable clips, light-duty shelving and other household fittings
In each package, you will receive 100 5mm x 25mm wall plugs. A dependable set of fixings for homeowners, tradespeople, decorators and anyone tackling routine installation work
description: This 100-piece pack of 5mm wall plugs provides a reliable and versatile fixing solution for a wide variety of household and professional installation tasks. Each plug measures 25mm in length and is designed for use in solid materials such as brick, blockwork, stone and concrete, making them suitable for most common wall-mounting applications. When used with the appropriate screw, the plug expands evenly to create a firm, secure grip within the wall, helping to prevent movement and ensuring a stable fixing that lasts. These 5mm plugs are ideal for light to medium-duty jobs including mounting small brackets, picture frames, hooks, bathroom accessories, cable clips, signage, light fittings and other home improvement or repair tasks. Their compact size makes them particularly useful in situations where a strong anchor is required without the need for deeper drilling or larger hardware. With 100 pieces included, this pack ensures you always have the right fixings on hand, whether you’re tackling quick repairs, decorating a room or working on ongoing DIY projects. Durable, easy to use and compatible with standard screws, these 5mm x 25mm wall plugs are a practical addition to any toolbox great for tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts who want consistent, dependable performance for everyday installations.
